project_requirements: Publish the completed actual-project reliability fixes as a Project Governor patch release.
Keep Codex and Claude Code plugin metadata, release notes, feature matrix, tests, and install instructions in sync.
Preserve dependency-free deterministic helper scripts and avoid package or lockfile changes.
Release publishing must use gh/GitHub API transport, not plain git push.

dependencies.name: Project Governor plugin
dependencies.usage: Codex and Claude Code governance plugin metadata, runtime templates, skills, deterministic helper scripts, tests, and docs.
requirement_matches: execution policy gate for user-selected command transports
release publishing with gh/GitHub API transport
dependencies.notes: Patch release for actual-project reliability and governance alignment. It adds no dependencies, package manifests, lockfiles, or runtime services.
constraints: No package manifest or lockfile changes.
Template path changes must be documented and tested.
Deterministic JSON output shape changes must be documented and tested.
